7w9v4fsbg5ydxsr2.q: Find the difference between the average percentage of even and odd years
7w9v4fsbg5ydxsr2.e:
1. Retrieve the even years' percentage value
2. calculate the average of them
3. Retrieve the odd years' percentage value
4. Calculate the average of them
5. Get the difference between even years' average and odd   years' average
7w9v4fsbg5ydxsr2.cand: {"ops":[{"op":"filter","id":"n1","meta":{"nodeId":"n1","inputs":[],"sentenceIndex":1},"field":"Year","include":["2010","2012","2014","2016","2018"]},{"op":"average","id":"n2","meta":{"nodeId":"n2","inputs":["n1"],"sentenceIndex":1},"field":"Percentage of gross domestic product"}],"ops2":[{"op":"filter","id":"n3","meta":{"nodeId":"n3","inputs":[],"sentenceIndex":2},"field":"Year","include":["2009","2011","2013","2015","2017"]},{"op":"average","id":"n4","meta":{"nodeId":"n4","inputs":["n3"],"sentenceIndex":2},"field":"Percentage of gross domestic product"}],"ops3":[{"op":"diff","id":"n5","meta":{"nodeId":"n5","inputs":["n2","n4"],"sentenceIndex":3},"targetA":"ref:n2","targetB":"ref:n4","signed":true}]}

95yhyqjyeu4fohbj.q: Is the average of the minimum and maximum values greater compared to the value in 2010?
95yhyqjyeu4fohbj.e:
Add the minimum and maximum values.
Divide the added value by two.
Find the value for 2010.
Compare the value in 2010 with the average value added.
95yhyqjyeu4fohbj.cand: {"ops":[{"op":"findExtremum","id":"n1","meta":{"nodeId":"n1","inputs":[],"sentenceIndex":1},"which":"max","field":"Number of people in millions"},{"op":"findExtremum","id":"n2","meta":{"nodeId":"n2","inputs":[],"sentenceIndex":1},"which":"min","field":"Number of people in millions"}],"ops2":[{"op":"add","id":"n3","meta":{"nodeId":"n3","inputs":["n1","n2"],"sentenceIndex":2},"targetA":"ref:n1","targetB":"ref:n2"},{"op":"scale","id":"n4","meta":{"nodeId":"n4","inputs":["n3"],"sentenceIndex":2},"target":"ref:n3","factor":0.5}],"ops3":[{"op":"retrieveValue","id":"n5","meta":{"nodeId":"n5","inputs":[],"sentenceIndex":3},"target":"2010","field":"Number of people in millions"}],"ops4":[{"op":"compareBool","id":"n6","meta":{"nodeId":"n6","inputs":["n4","n5"],"sentenceIndex":4},"operator":">","targetA":"ref:n4","targetB":"ref:n5"}]}

ahxo354yj7g4m6h1.q: If the total GDP is 2 billion, what was the average annual percentage increase in this industry's gdp contribution from 2000 to 2010?
ahxo354yj7g4m6h1.e:
1. Determine industry gdp percentage increase from 2000-2010 (10-8)= 2% increase 
2. 2 billion times .02
3. divide percentage by 10 years to find anual =x/2 billion
